hero.subline: Software Engineer with practical experience in frontend and full stack web development, with strong focus on React, Next.js, Angular, JavaScript, TypeScript, and building modern responsive web applications. Also brings prior teaching experience in training children.

coach.name: Ruba Ismail Sliem
coach.role: Software Engineer | Frontend & Full Stack Developer | Mentor
coach.university: Bachelor of Computer Science, Menoufia University
snapshot: Software Engineer with experience in React, Next.js, Angular, and Node.js
Built responsive and modern web applications using JavaScript and TypeScript
Worked on full stack projects with frontend, backend, APIs, authentication, and databases
Background in teaching and training, including working with children in structured learning environments
Interested in helping learners build strong programming and frontend development foundations
achievements: Worked on real-world frontend and full stack web development projects
Completed intensive training in modern web development technologies
Built applications involving authentication, dashboards, data flow, search, cart systems, and payments
Has prior educational experience training children in structured programs
Combines technical implementation with learner-friendly explanation and mentoring mindset
projects: Shipping Platform – Full stack website for managing orders, shipments, roles, and delivery cost calculation
Ecommerce Website – Full stack application with categories, search, forms, authentication, favorites, cart, and payment flow
Trending Movie App – Application for browsing and searching movies, TV shows, and actors with authentication features
Restaurant Website – React-based frontend project with dynamic meal browsing, cart, favorites, login, and order confirmation

items.q: How can I request Ruba for coaching or training?
items.a: Use the WhatsApp button to send your training needs. Coach Academy will coordinate the suitable format, schedule, and learning goals.

items.q: What are Ruba’s main teaching and technical strengths?
items.a: Frontend Development, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Angular, programming foundations, and practical project-based learning.
Yes. She has previous training experience, including working with children in structured educational programs, alongside her software development background.

footer.blurb: Empowering talent through hands-on, industry-aligned tech coaching.
